title: UTC+12

**UTC+12:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +12:00.

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

*Principal cities: [Anadyr](/wiki/Anadyr_(town) "Anadyr (town)"), [Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky](/wiki/Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky "Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky"), [Mata Utu](/wiki/Mata_Utu "Mata Utu"), [Funafuti](/wiki/Funafuti "Funafuti"), [Majuro](/wiki/Majuro "Majuro"), [Yaren](/wiki/Yaren_District "Yaren District"), [South Tarawa](/wiki/South_Tarawa "South Tarawa") on [Tarawa](/wiki/Tarawa "Tarawa"), [Suva](/wiki/Suva "Suva")*

### North Asia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: North Asia")]

* [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") – [Kamchatka Time](/wiki/Kamchatka_Time "Kamchatka Time")[[1]](#cite_note-ttrussia-1)
  + [Far Eastern Federal District](/wiki/Far_Eastern_Federal_District "Far Eastern Federal District")
    - [Chukotka Autonomous Okrug](/wiki/Chukotka_Autonomous_Okrug "Chukotka Autonomous Okrug") and [Kamchatka Krai](/wiki/Kamchatka_Krai "Kamchatka Krai")

### Oceania

* [Kiribati](/wiki/Kiribati "Kiribati")
  + [Gilbert Islands](/wiki/Gilbert_Islands "Gilbert Islands")
    - (Including the Islands of [Abaiang](/wiki/Abaiang "Abaiang"), [Abemama](/wiki/Abemama "Abemama"), [Aranuka](/wiki/Aranuka "Aranuka"), [Arorae](/wiki/Arorae "Arorae"), [Banaba](/wiki/Banaba "Banaba"), [Beru](/wiki/Beru_(atoll) "Beru (atoll)"), [Butaritari](/wiki/Butaritari "Butaritari"), [Kuria](/wiki/Kuria_(atoll) "Kuria (atoll)"), [Maiana](/wiki/Maiana "Maiana"), [Makin](/wiki/Makin_(atoll) "Makin (atoll)"), [Marakei](/wiki/Marakei "Marakei"), [Nikunau](/wiki/Nikunau "Nikunau"), [Nonouti](/wiki/Nonouti "Nonouti"), [Onotoa](/wiki/Onotoa "Onotoa"), [Tabiteuea](/wiki/Tabiteuea "Tabiteuea"), [Tamana](/wiki/Tamana,_Kiribati "Tamana, Kiribati") and [Tarawa](/wiki/Tarawa "Tarawa"))
* [Nauru](/wiki/Nauru "Nauru")[[2]](#cite_note-wtz12-2)

##### Melanesia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Melanesia")]

* [Fiji](/wiki/Fiji "Fiji")[[2]](#cite_note-wtz12-2)

## As standard time (Southern Hemisphere winter)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: As standard time (Southern Hemisphere winter)")]

*Principal cities: [Auckland](/wiki/Auckland "Auckland"), [Christchurch](/wiki/Christchurch "Christchurch"), [Wellington](/wiki/Wellington "Wellington")*

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Oceania")]

#### Australasia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Australasia")]

* [New Zealand](/wiki/New_Zealand "New Zealand") (except [Chatham Islands](/wiki/Chatham_Islands "Chatham Islands")) – [New Zealand Standard Time](/wiki/Time_in_New_Zealand "Time in New Zealand")

### Antarctica

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Antarctica")]

* Some research bases in [Antarctica](/wiki/Antarctica "Antarctica"), in particular the [South Pole](/wiki/South_Pole "South Pole") and the [McMurdo Station](/wiki/McMurdo_Station "McMurdo Station"). At [New Year](/wiki/New_Year "New Year"), these places are the first in the world to see the [Sun](/wiki/Sun "Sun"), which is then [visible at midnight](/wiki/Midnight_sun "Midnight sun").

## As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)")]

*Principal towns: [Burnt Pine](/wiki/Burnt_Pine "Burnt Pine"), [Kingston](/wiki/Kingston,_Norfolk_Island "Kingston, Norfolk Island")*

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Oceania")]

* [Australia](/wiki/Australia "Australia")
  + [Norfolk Island](/wiki/Norfolk_Island "Norfolk Island")[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Discrepancies between official UTC+12:00 and geographical UTC+12:00

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Discrepancies between official UTC+12:00 and geographical UTC+12:00")]

### Areas in UTC+12:00 longitudes using other time zones

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Areas in UTC+12:00 longitudes using other time zones")]

Using [UTC-10:00](/wiki/UTC%E2%88%9210:00 "UTC−10:00")

* United States
  + The western part of [Aleutian Islands](/wiki/Aleutian_Islands "Aleutian Islands"), [Alaska](/wiki/Alaska "Alaska") (standard time)

### Areas outside UTC+12:00 longitudes using UTC+12:00 time

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Areas outside UTC+12:00 longitudes using UTC+12:00 time")]

#### Areas between 157°30′ E and 172°30′ E ("Physical" [UTC+11:00](/wiki/UTC%2B11:00 "UTC+11:00"))

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=17 "Edit section: Areas between 157°30′ E and 172°30′ E  (\"Physical\" UTC+11:00)")]

* Russia
  + The western part of Chukotka Autonomous Okrug
  + Kamchatka Krai
* United States
  + Wake Island
* Marshall Islands
* Nauru

#### Areas between 180° and 157°30′ W ("Physical" [UTC-12:00](/wiki/UTC%E2%88%9212:00 "UTC−12:00") and [UTC-11:00](/wiki/UTC%E2%88%9211:00 "UTC−11:00"))

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=18 "Edit section: Areas between 180° and 157°30′ W (\"Physical\" UTC-12:00 and UTC-11:00)")]

* New Zealand
  + [Kermadec Islands](/wiki/Kermadec_Islands "Kermadec Islands")
* Fiji
  + Eastern parts, including:
    - Ringgold Isles
    - Northern Lau Group
    - Southern Lau Group
    - Eastern of Moala Group
    - Vatoa Island
    - Ono-i-Lau
    - Tuvana-i-Tholo
* France
  + Wallis and Futuna
* Russia
  + The eastern of [Wrangel Island](/wiki/Wrangel_Island "Wrangel Island")
  + The easternmost part of Chukotka Autonomous Okrug, including [Chukchi Peninsula](/wiki/Chukchi_Peninsula "Chukchi Peninsula") and [Big Diomede Island](/wiki/Big_Diomede "Big Diomede") (partly within the "physical" UTC-11:00 area)

## Historical changes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B12:00&action=edit&section=19 "Edit section: Historical changes")]

[Kwajalein Atoll](/wiki/Kwajalein_Atoll "Kwajalein Atoll"), in the [Marshall Islands](/wiki/Marshall_Islands "Marshall Islands"), advanced 24 hours to the [Eastern Hemisphere](/wiki/Eastern_Hemisphere "Eastern Hemisphere") side of the [International Date Line](/wiki/International_Date_Line "International Date Line") by skipping August 21, 1993.[[4]](#cite_note-4)
